narrative:
Seven Hills-03-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,082 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points.
